mapper.select: select la_num, user_name, lt_num, la_status, la_regdate from lecApplication l inner join users u on l.user_num = u.user_num inner join lecRecruit r on l.lt_num = r.lt_num order by l.la_num desc

select la_num, user_name, lt_num, la_intro, la_status, la_regdate from lecApplication l inner join users u on l.user_num = u.user_num inner join lecRecruit r on l.lt_num = r.lt_num where la_num = #{la_num}
mapper.insert: insert into lecApplication (la_num, user_num, lt_num, la_intro, la_status, la_regdate) values (#{la_num}, #{user_num}, #{lt_num}, #{la_intro}, #{la_status}, #{la_regdate})
mapper.select: select lecApplication_seq.nextval as la_num from dual
